info.description: Proxy bridge for LLM API credentials.
info.title: LLMVault API

post.description: Changes the authenticated user's password. Revokes all sessions.
Confirms a user's email address using a verification token.
Sends a password reset link to the email address if an account exists.
Authenticates a user with email and password.
Revokes a refresh token.

get.description: Returns the current user and their organization memberships.

post.description: Exchanges a refresh token for new access and refresh tokens.
Creates a new user account, organization, and sends a confirmation email.
Sends a new email confirmation link. Rate limited to 1 per 60 seconds.
Resets a user's password using a reset token. Revokes all sessions.

get.description: Returns agents for the current organization with optional filters.

post.description: Creates a new agent tied to an identity and credential. Shared agents are pushed to Bridge immediately.

get.description: Returns conversations for the specified agent.

post.description: Creates a new conversation for an agent. For shared agents, reuses the existing sandbox. For dedicated agents, spins up a new sandbox.

get.description: Returns all forge runs for the specified agent, ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates and starts a new forge run for the specified agent using the provided models, credentials, and configuration.

get.description: Returns a single agent by ID.

put.description: Updates an agent. Re-validates credential/model compatibility. Shared agents are re-pushed to Bridge.

delete.description: Deletes an agent and removes it from Bridge.

get.description: Returns setup commands and env var key names for dedicated agents.

put.description: Sets setup commands and encrypted environment variables. Only available for dedicated sandbox agents.

get.description: Returns API keys for the current organization with cursor pagination.

post.description: Creates a new API key for the current organization. The plaintext key is returned once.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an API key by setting its revoked_at timestamp.

get.description: Returns audit log entries for the current organization with cursor pagination. Cursor is the last-seen entry ID.

parameters.description: Pagination cursor (entry ID) from previous response
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: Returns every integration provider in the catalog with action counts.
Returns a single integration with its full action list.
Returns all actions for a single integration, optionally filtered by access type.

parameters.description: Filter by access type (read or write)
parameters.name: access

get.description: Returns connect sessions for the current organization with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.description: Filter by status: active, activated, expired
parameters.name: status

post.description: Creates a short-lived session for the Connect widget. Requires an identity_id or external_id to link the session to an end-user.

get.description: Returns a single connect session by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a connect session, immediately invalidating it.

get.description: Returns active connections enriched with their available actions from the catalog.
Returns a single connection by ID.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a connection by setting revoked_at.

get.description: Returns a conversation by ID.

delete.description: Permanently ends a conversation. Subsequent operations return 410.

post.description: Cancels the current in-flight LLM call or tool execution.

get.description: Returns pending tool approval requests for the conversation.

post.description: Approves or denies a pending tool execution request.

get.description: Returns webhook events persisted for the conversation. Filterable by event type.

parameters.description: Filter by event type (e.g. MessageReceived, ResponseCompleted)
parameters.name: type

post.description: Sends a message to the agent in the conversation. Returns 202 immediately; response streams via SSE.

get.description: Opens a Server-Sent Events stream for real-time agent responses. Events include message_start, content_delta, tool_call_start, tool_call_result, message_end, done.
Returns credentials for the current organization with cursor-based pagination and usage stats.

post.description: Stores an encrypted LLM API credential for the current organization.

get.description: Returns a single credential by ID with usage stats.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a credential by setting its revoked_at timestamp.

get.description: Returns all custom preview domains for the current organization.

post.description: Register a new custom preview domain for the current organization. Returns DNS records to create.

delete.description: Remove a custom preview domain and its TLS configuration.

post.description: Checks that both DNS CNAME records are correctly configured and triggers wildcard TLS provisioning.

get.description: Returns a forge run with all iterations and their details.

post.description: Copies the best iteration's result to the target agent's configuration.
Cancels an active (queued or running) forge run.

get.description: Returns the audit trail of events for a forge run.
Returns eval results for all test cases in a specific forge iteration.
Real-time SSE stream of forge events for a forge run. Supports resume via Last-Event-ID.
Returns generation records for the current organization with cursor pagination and filtering.
Returns a single generation record by ID.
Returns identities for the current organization with cursor-based pagination and usage stats.

post.description: Creates a new identity for the current organization.

get.description: Returns a single identity by ID.

put.description: Updates an existing identity's external_id, metadata, or rate limits.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an identity by ID.

get.description: Returns setup commands and env var key names (values are never exposed).

put.description: Sets setup commands and encrypted environment variables for shared sandboxes.

get.description: Returns integrations for the current organization with cursor pagination.

post.description: Creates a new integration backed by a Nango provider.

get.description: Returns Nango providers that have verified action definitions in the catalog.
Returns a single integration by ID.

put.description: Updates an integration's display name, credentials, or metadata.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an integration and removes it from Nango.

get.description: Returns connections for an integration with cursor pagination.

post.description: Creates a new connection for an integration.
Creates a new organization and adds the requesting user as an admin member.

get.description: Returns the organization resolved from the request's auth context.
Returns every provider in the catalog with a model count.
Returns a single provider with its full model list.
Returns the model catalog for a single provider.
Returns aggregated analytics from generations with flexible grouping and filtering.

parameters.description: Comma-separated grouping dimensions: model, provider, credential, user, identity
parameters.name: group_by

parameters.description: Time granularity: hour or day (default: day)
parameters.name: date_part

get.description: Returns sandbox templates for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new sandbox template with build commands.

get.description: Returns a single sandbox template by ID.

put.description: Updates a sandbox template. Resets build status if commands change.

delete.description: Deletes a template. Fails if agents still reference it.

get.description: Returns sandboxes for the current organization.
Returns sandbox details by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a sandbox from the provider and removes the DB record.

post.description: Runs an array of shell commands sequentially inside the sandbox. Stops on first failure.
Stops a running sandbox via the sandbox provider.

get.description: Returns the Connect widget settings for the current organization.

put.description: Updates the Connect widget settings (e.g. allowed origins) for the current organization.

get.description: Returns the webhook configuration for the current organization.

put.description: Creates a new webhook configuration (with generated secret) or updates the URL of an existing configuration.

delete.description: Deletes the webhook configuration for the current organization.

post.description: Generates a new webhook secret for the existing configuration.

get.description: Returns tokens for the organization with cursor pagination. Supports filtering by credential_id.

post.description: Creates a short-lived JWT proxy token scoped to a credential.

delete.description: Revokes a proxy token by its JTI and propagates through cache tiers.

get.description: Returns aggregated usage statistics for the current organization.
Returns active connections (credentials) for the session's identity with cursor pagination.

post.description: Creates a new credential connection for the session's identity via the widget.

delete.description: Revokes (soft-deletes) a connection owned by the session's identity.

post.description: Decrypts the stored API key and verifies it against the provider.

get.description: Returns integrations configured by the org for the current session.
Returns Nango providers that have verified action definitions in the catalog.

post.description: Creates a Nango connect session scoped to a specific integration.
post.summary: Create a connect session for an integration

post.description: Stores a new connection record after a successful Nango auth flow.
post.summary: Create a connection via the widget

delete.description: Revokes (soft-deletes) an integration connection owned by the session's identity.

patch.description: Updates the resources configured for a connection (resource selection).

get.description: Fetches available resources of a specific type from the provider API.

parameters.description: Nango connection ID from OAuth flow
parameters.name: nango_connection_id

get.description: Returns all LLM providers available in the registry.
Returns details about the current Connect widget session.

deterministic_results.description: Deterministic check results (run before LLM judge).

failure_category.description: safety, correctness, completeness, tone, tool_usage, none

score.description: Judge verdict (from LLM judge, after deterministic checks).

status.description: Status tracks result progress: pending → running → judging → completed|failed.

eval_score_history.description: Per-eval score tracking across iterations for regression detection.

phase.description: Phase within this iteration: designing → eval_designing → evaluating → judging → completed|failed.

system_prompt.description: Architect output — persisted after designing phase.

org_id.description: optional: scope token to a specific org
